name: Sirius
description: The brightest star in Earth's night sky, also called the Dog Star.

name: Betelgeuse
description: A red supergiant star nearing the end of its life cycle.

name: Polaris
description: The North Star, positioned close to the north celestial pole.

name: Vega
description: A bright, nearby star and one of the vertices of the Summer Triangle.

name: Proxima Centauri
description: The closest known star to the Sun and part of the Alpha Centauri system.

name: Rigel
description: A luminous blue supergiant that marks Orion's foot.

name: Aldebaran
description: A giant orange star that appears near the Hyades cluster.

name: Antares
description: A red supergiant and one of the brightest stars in Scorpius.

name: Capella
description: A bright multiple-star system visible in the northern winter sky.

name: Spica
description: A hot blue binary system and the brightest star in Virgo.

name: Arcturus
description: An orange giant and one of the brightest stars in the night sky.

name: Deneb
description: A very luminous supergiant and part of the Summer Triangle.
